$comment: Navy (Formal) — the lead hue moves from teal to navy for a formal, corporate register (board, IR, regulated). Only role→sanctioned-palette remaps and the chart lead colour change; every hex is already in tokens.colors, so the colour allowlist is unchanged and validate/verify stay template-agnostic.

$template.label: ネイビー / Formal
$template.use: 取締役会・IR・金融など、硬めの場。ティールをネイビーへ。
